title: Hypothesis (v2, multi-agent extension)
description: v2 extension of v1 Hypothesis. Adds synthesis_depth, upstream_hypothesis_refs, and composite_upstream_bme_score. non_authoritative_flag remains hard-coded true and non-overridable.
$comment: Extends v1 Hypothesis. synthesis_depth is the primary counter enforcing max_synthesis_depth ceilings from AgentIdentity. composite_upstream_bme_score aggregates upstream agent BME scores at synthesis time.

non_authoritative_flag.description: Hard-coded true. Non-overridable. Preserved from v1.

synthesis_depth.description: Net-new in v2. Count of non-human inferential layers from origin to this Hypothesis. When this value equals an upstream AgentIdentity.max_synthesis_depth, the orchestrator must emit DEPTH_LIMIT_REACHED and route to HITL. Governance rationale: Invariant 2 (Non-Bypass) structural enforcement.

upstream_hypothesis_refs.description: Net-new in v2. Ordered list of Hypothesis artifact IDs consumed in producing this Hypothesis. Empty list indicates a first-order hypothesis grounded only in Observations. Governance rationale: Invariant 4 (Reconstructability).

composite_upstream_bme_score.description: Net-new in v2. Weighted aggregate of upstream agents' BME-CI scores at the moment of synthesis. Formula and weights defined in /shared/bme-metric-suite/composite_bme_ci.py. Governance rationale: supports BME-A extensions (BAR-A, ECPI-A, IQD-A) by carrying upstream contamination forward through synthesis chains.
